facts: The backend app surface is now intentionally chat-engine-only: app.py keeps only chat, access, sessions, and files routers.
QueryEngine is now the main ordinary-turn runtime boundary for compliance preflight, evidence gating, helper-agent event extraction, and the harness loop.
TurnLedger is now the best persistence boundary for assistant segments and typed transcript blocks.
Layered runtime config already exists across defaults, user, project, and local files, but its provenance is not yet exposed operationally.
PythonReplTool now keys interpreter state by session id, which fixes the earlier process-global REPL leakage risk.
The biggest remaining harness concentration point is backend/api/chat.py, which still owns SSE shaping, tool audit emission, final turn persistence, and observability.
